status.openFromTelegram: Open this mini app from Telegram to authorize the session.
status.enterPracticeMessage: Enter a practice message before sending.
overview.title: Progress snapshot
recent.title: Recent sessions
recent.subtitle: Latest activity from your language practice.
recent.empty.authorized: Your recent practice sessions will appear here.
recent.empty.unauthorized: Session history becomes available after Telegram authorization.
practice.title: Continue practice
practice.placeholder: Ask for a roleplay, continue a conversation, or request grammar feedback.
repeat.title: Repeat words
repeat.subtitle: Focused repetition from your active review queue.
repeat.empty.authorized: Words and phrases from your review queue will appear here for focused repetition.
repeat.empty.unauthorized: Authorize the mini app in Telegram to unlock your repetition list.
review.title: Today review
review.subtitle: Fix recent mistakes and keep the queue moving.
review.empty.authorized: Keep practicing and new review items will appear here.
review.empty.unauthorized: Authorize the mini app in Telegram to load your review queue.
